hooks.command: $json = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = $json.tool_input.file_path; try { $issues = Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path $fp -ErrorAction Stop; if ($issues) { Write-Host 'PSScriptAnalyzer issues found:'; $issues | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  - ($($_.Message)) at line $($_.Line)" }; exit 1 } else { Write-Host 'PSScriptAnalyzer: OK' } } catch { Write-Error "Linting failed: $_"; exit 1 }
